title: Modernised court and tribunal services
body: "We’ve made justice more accessible, efficient and user-friendly.  Each case study provides insight into service development, key achievements, user feedback, and practical information on accessing these services.   Explore our case studies to discover how these digital innovations are reducing paperwork, speeding up processes, and making justice more accessible - whether you’re a legal professional, judicial office holder, member of court or tribunal staff or a member of the public navigating the justice system. "
